creator: sbaskinger@lumeta.com
text:
I retried this using a D2950 and a 32-bit install and an AMD-64 install 
of RELENG_6 2006-12-14. The 32 bit system behaves wonderfully. The 
64-bit system hangs as described still.

Hope this helps narrow the problem. Do let me know if I can help test 
any fixes.

Sam
